zh.lifeSummary: 當Crisle verch Gawdyn於1344年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Aydan Ap Llewelyn27歲，母親verch Rhys20歲。她於1364年與Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd在威爾士格拉莫爾根利安達福結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年在她的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Crisle verch Gawdyn于1344年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Aydan Ap Llewelyn27岁，母亲verch Rhys20岁。她于1364年与Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd在威尔士格拉莫爾根利安達福结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1386年在她的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Crisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Kreisler or Griessler, a topographic name for someone who lived or farmed in an area of sand (see Gries ), or (in the south) an occupational name for a grocer, from Middle High German griezmel ‘milled grain’ (from griez ‘sand, gravel’).

variants.name: Kreisler
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Chana, Dorit, Myer.  German Fritz, Kurt.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): derivative of Kreisel , with the agent suffix -er.

en.lifeSummary: When Crisle verch Gawdyn was born in 1344, in Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Aydan Ap Llewelyn, was 27 and her mother, verch Rhys, was 20. She married Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd in 1364, in Llandaff, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1386, in her hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.LLANDAF COURT, SOUTH GLAMORGAN, WALES: Llandaff, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Crisle verch Gawdyn est née en 1344, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Aydan Ap Llewelyn, avait 27 ans et sa mère, verch Rhys, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd en 1364, à Llandaff, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1386, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Crisle verch Gawdyn 1344 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aydan Ap Llewelyn 27 und ihre Mutter verch Rhys 20. Sie hat 1364 in Llandaff, Glamorgan, Wales Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1386 im Alter von 42 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Crisle verch Gawdyn è nata il nel 1344 nel Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Aydan Ap Llewelyn, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, verch Rhys, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd nel 1364, nel Llandaff, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1386, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Crisle verch Gawdynが1344年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Aydan Ap Llewelynは27歳，母verch Rhysは20歳であった。1364年にウェールズグラモーガンランダッフでSir Ieuan ap Gruffyddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1386年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Crisle verch Gawdyn(이)가 1344년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aydan Ap Llewelyn(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 verch Rhys(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1364년 웨일스 글램르건 랜다프에서 Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 그녀의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Crisle verch Gawdyn nasceu em 1344, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Aydan Ap Llewelyn, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, verch Rhys, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd em 1364, em Llandaff, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1386, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ro.LLANDAF COURT, SOUTH GLAMORGAN, WALES: Llandaff, Glamorgan, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Crisle verch Gawdyn родилась в 1344 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Aydan Ap Llewelyn было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали verch Rhys, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd в 1364 г. в местности лландафф, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1386 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Crisle verch Gawdyn nació en 1344, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Aydan Ap Llewelyn, tenía 27 años y su mamá, verch Rhys, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd en 1364, en Llandaff, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1386, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
